name: Carol Burnett
blurb: The queen of TV variety; her sketch-comedy hour is a genre landmark.
bio: Carol Burnett is an American comedian, actress, and singer whose groundbreaking variety program, The Carol Burnett Show (1967-1978), won 25 Emmy Awards and made her one of television's most beloved performers. Her recurring characters included the charwoman and the put-upon secretary Mrs. Wiggins.

bits.t: Mrs. Wiggins Learns How to Gamble
